title: Feature: add reindex command
task: Add a `reindex` CLI command that forces a full re-index of the project (equivalent to `mnemex index --force`). It should accept the same options as `index` but always set force=true.
output:
Done. Here's what was added:

**`src/cli.ts`:**

1. **Switch case** (line ~277): `case "reindex"` calls `handleIndex(["--force", ...args.slice(1)])` — prepends `--force` and passes all other args through unchanged.

2. **Compact help** (line ~127): Added `reindex` to the commands list.

3. **Full help** (line ~6366): Added `reindex [path]` entry with description "Force full re-index (equivalent to index --force)".

The implementation is minimal — `reindex` simply delegates to the existing `handleIndex` with `--force` injected, so it inherits all `index` options (`--no-llm`, `--wait`, `--concurrency=`, path arg, etc.) automatically.

claudeJson.result:
Done. Here's what was added:

**`src/cli.ts`:**

1. **Switch case** (line ~277): `case "reindex"` calls `handleIndex(["--force", ...args.slice(1)])` — prepends `--force` and passes all other args through unchanged.

2. **Compact help** (line ~127): Added `reindex` to the commands list.

3. **Full help** (line ~6366): Added `reindex [path]` entry with description "Force full re-index (equivalent to index --force)".

The implementation is minimal — `reindex` simply delegates to the existing `handleIndex` with `--force` injected, so it inherits all `index` options (`--no-llm`, `--wait`, `--concurrency=`, path arg, etc.) automatically.
